concerns.text: FR-005 specifies 'compute permutation importance scores and generate SHAP summary plots' but the Assumptions section states 'FR-005 shall include sensitivity analysis across δ variations of {0.01, 0.05, 0.1}'. The FR does not include this sensitivity analysis requirement, creating a mismatch between the FR text and the Assumptions section.

Edge Cases state 'The system MUST sample compositions to fit within 6 GB RAM before processing' but SC-005 states 'Dataset memory footprint is measured against the 7 GB RAM runner constraint'. The sampling target (6 GB) and measurement reference (7 GB) should be consistent or explicitly explained as a safety margin.

Assumptions state 'The Materials Project and NIST Alloy Database contain phase labels... for at least 500 multi-component metallic compositions' but US-2 Acceptance Scenario 1 specifies 'a labeled dataset of 1000 alloy compositions (500 glass-forming, 500 crystalline)'. The assumption minimum (500 total) conflicts with the test scenario requirement (1000 total, balanced).
